Service 02

Leads & Ventas

Del primer contacto al cierre. Sin fugas.

We transform interest into revenue with a smarter, more agile and connected commercial operation. We integrate lead capture, WhatsApp, CRM and human follow-up in a single flow so no opportunity goes cold — turning every contact into strategic value with the urgency and energy the Caribbean brings to every deal.

Features

  • Lead capture and qualification
  • Multichannel commercial follow-up
  • WhatsApp Business sales
  • CRM management and automation
  • Inactive customer reactivation
  • Opportunity follow-up and closing

Benefits

  • Higher Conversion: A structured, data-driven process that closes the gaps where opportunities leak and increases your closing rate.
  • Full Pipeline Visibility: Complete traceability of the commercial funnel with real-time performance metrics — every lead, every stage, every result.
  • Speed as a Closing Lever: Every lead attended at peak purchase intent. Speed isn't just a metric — it's the difference between a deal won and a deal lost.
  • Measurable ROI: Every commercial action is traceable from first contact to close. No guessing — only data that justifies the investment.

What we do

Generating leads is easy — converting them requires strategy, speed, and the right follow-up at the right moment. We turn your commercial process into a system that actually closes, integrating capture, contact, CRM and closing into one connected, fully measured flow.

  • Multichannel Follow-Up
  • Sell at the Right Moment
  • CRM Organization & Management
  • Reactivate Existing Opportunities

Frequently Asked Questions

How is your process different from traditional sales?

We integrate lead capture, WhatsApp and CRM in a single automated flow with response speed and full funnel traceability — backed by Caribbean relationship energy that drives conversions.

Which CRMs do you work with?

We integrate with Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho CRM, Pipedrive and custom solutions via REST API — built around your existing systems.

How do you reactivate existing customer bases?

With segmented campaigns on WhatsApp, email and voice — combining AI automation with human intervention at moments of highest purchase intent.

What is the billing model?

Flexible: per management (monthly fee), per result (sales commission) or mixed, depending on your objectives and scale.

Unified service foundation

  • True Omnichannel: Calls, WhatsApp, Instagram, chat, email and CRM unified in one fluid operation. No disconnected channels, no lost context, no friction.
  • AI-Powered Automation: Autonomous agents and intelligent flows that optimize every process, scale without limits, and free your human team to do what only humans can do.
  • Real-Time Executive Dashboard: Full operational visibility with Looker Studio and Power BI — every metric, every SLA, every decision grounded in data.

Contact

Prefer a live demo? We can show real cases, dashboards and C-DOM metrics in 20 minutes.
